ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the industry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the industry is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goods_services" (
  "good_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each good or service */,
  "good_service_name" TEXT /* Name of the good or service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the good or service */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the good or service */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the good or service */,
  "is_taxable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the good or service is taxable */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate if the good or service is taxable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the good or service record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("good_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry the producer belongs to */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the producer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration of the producer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the producer is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the producer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_producers_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "consumer_name" TEXT /* Name of the consumer */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry the consumer belongs to */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the consumer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration of the consumer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the consumer is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the consumer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumers_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer */,
  "good_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the good or service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the good or service */,
  "value_added" REAL /* Value added in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the good or service */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the quantity */,
  "is_tax_included" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the price includes tax */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount if applicable */,
  "is_refundable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transaction is refundable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transaction record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_good_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("good_service_id") REFERENCES goods_services ("good_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_output_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input-output table */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "good_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the good or service */,
  "input_value" REAL /* Input value for the good or service */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Output value for the good or service */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the input-output table */,
  "source_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry from which the input is sourced */,
  "source_good_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the good or service from which the input is sourced */,
  "is_intermediate" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the good or service is used as an intermediate input */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the input-output table record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_output_tables_source_good_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_good_service_id") REFERENCES goods_services ("good_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_output_tables_good_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("good_service_id") REFERENCES goods_services ("good_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_output_tables_source_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_output_tables_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_added" (
  "value_added_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value added entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "good_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the good or service */,
  "value_added" REAL /* Value added for the good or service */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the value added calculation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the value added record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_added_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_added_good_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("good_service_id") REFERENCES goods_services ("good_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_added_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "final_demand" (
  "demand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each final demand entry */,
  "good_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the good or service */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "demand" REAL /* Final demand for the good or service */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the final demand calculation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the final demand record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_final_demand_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_final_demand_good_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("good_service_id") REFERENCES goods_services ("good_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sum_of_values_added" (
  "sum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sum of values added entry */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "sum_of_values_added" REAL /* Sum of values added for the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sum of values added calculation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sum of values added record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sum_of_values_added_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., input-output, value added) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_result" TEXT /* Result of the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the query was executed */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query execution in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the query record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
